zh.lifeSummary: 當Berta di Milano於0975年出生在義大利皮蒙特托利諾托利諾時，她的父親Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”28歲，母親Railende di Como24歲。她和Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa至少有3個女兒。她去世於1037年12月29日在義大利皮蒙特托利諾蘇薩享年62歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berta di Milano于0975年出生在意大利皮蒙特托利諾托利諾时，她的父亲Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”28岁，母亲Railende di Como24岁。她和Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa至少有3个女儿。她去世于1037年12月29日在意大利皮蒙特托利諾蘇薩享年62岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Milano
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Vito, Antonio, Carmelo, Ciro, Domenic, Francesca, Luigi, Matteo, Pasquale, Rocco.

Italian and Jewish (from Italy): habitational name from Milan (Italian Milano, from Latin Mediolan(i)um, composed of Celtic elements meaning ‘middle’ + ‘plain’), a city in northern Italy, capital of Lombardy.
In some cases also Spanish: of the same origin as 1 or a habitational name from Milano in Salamanca province.

variants.name: Milan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Carlos, Juan, Modesto, Nestor, Alfonso, Angel, Jesus, Joaquin, Jorge, Miguel.
Spanish (Milán) and French: nickname from the bird's name milán, milan ‘kite’, possibly denoting an avid person.
Spanish (Milán) and French: habitational name from the Italian city of Milan (see Milano ).

variants.name: Milani
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carlo, Renzo, Umberto, Aldo, Dino, Italo, Silvio, Caterina, Cesare, Dante, Domenico.
Italian: habitational name for someone from Milan (see   Milano  ). This is a typical Lombardic surname; there surnames derived from placenames usually have a pluralized form.

variants.name: Milana
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Milana, feminine form of Milano, inspired by the name of the city of Milan (see Milano ).

nameMeanings.name: Berta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berta di Milano was born in 0975, in Turin, Turin, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”, was 28 and her mother, Railende di Como, was 24. She had at least 3 daughters with Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa. She died on 29 December 1037, in Susa, Turin, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 62, and was buried in Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berta di Milano est née en 0975, à Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Railende di Como, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa. Elle est décédée le 29 décembre 1037, à Susa, Torino, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berta di Milano 0975 in Turin, Torino, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini” 28 und ihre Mutter Railende di Como 24. Sie hatte mit Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Dezember 1037 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Susa, Torino, Piemonte, Italien und wurde in Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Milano è nata il nel 0975 nel Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Railende di Como, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa. Morì il 29 dicembre 1037, nel Susa, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Berta di Milanoが0975年にイタリアピエモントトリノトリノで生まれた時，父Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”は28歳，母Railende di Comoは24歳であった。彼女はOlderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susaとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1037年12月29日にイタリアピエモントトリノスサで62歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berta di Milano(이)가 0975년 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 토리노에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Railende di Como(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1037년 12월 29일 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 수사에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Milano nasceu em 0975, em Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Railende di Como, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa. Ela faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1037, em Susa, Torino, Piemonte, Itália, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berta di Milano родилась в 0975 г. в местности торино, торино, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini” было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Railende di Como, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa. Она умерла 29 декабря 1037 г. в местности сьюса, торино, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berta di Milano nació en 0975, en Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Otbert II, Margrave of Milan Obertenghi “Adalbertini”, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Railende di Como, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1037, en Susa, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Piemonte, Italia.
